output.description: The output of this investigation.  Should be an informative summary of the investigation in markdown.

metrics_query.description: The metrics query to persist with this result

tool_name.description: The tool name used for querying metrics. This should be the exact tool/function name used to query the metrics.

tool_args.description: The arguments passed to the metrics tool/function call from `tool_name`.  This should be a JSON string. This is required but can be empty if needed.  Just pass as an unstructured object exactly as presented in the tool call history

summary.description: A two to three sentence summary of what this metrics query means, including what signal it measures and and concretely what you can conclude from it.

metrics_queries.description: The metrics queries gathered from the observability tool call

tool_name.description: The tool name used for querying metrics. This should be the exact tool/function name used to query the metrics.

tool_args.description: The arguments passed to the metrics tool/function call from `tool_name`.  This should be a JSON string. This is required but can be empty if needed.  Just pass as an unstructured object exactly as presented in the tool call history

summary.description: A two to three sentence summary of what this metrics query means, including what signal it measures and and concretely what you can conclude from it.

logs_queries.description: The logs queries gathered from the observability tool call

tool_name.description: The tool name used for querying logs. This should be the exact tool/function name used to query the logs.

tool_args.description: The arguments passed to the logs tool/function call from `tool_name`.  This should be a JSON string. This is required but can be empty if needed.  Just pass as an unstructured object exactly as presented in the tool call history

summary.description: A two to three sentence summary of what this logs query means, including what signal it measures and and concretely what you can conclude from it.

traces_queries.description: The traces queries gathered from the observability tool call

tool_name.description: The tool name used for querying traces.

tool_args.description: The arguments passed to the traces tool/function call from `tool_name`. This should be a JSON string.

summary.description: A two to three sentence summary of what this traces query means.

logs.description: The logs gathered from the observability tool call
